caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, black headphones, a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bowtie sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a microphone and appears to be speaking, with his mouth slightly open and his facial expression shifting subtly across the sequence. In the first instance, he gestures with his right hand near his chest. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some hanging clothing, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen logos appear in the lower corners, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." The scene remains static in terms of camera angle and setting, with the only movement being the man's subtle facial shifts and his hand gesture.
